eras.title: Autonomous Fortification
eras.subtitle: AI Agents and Security Hardening
eras.description: Established autonomous development capabilities with Overnight Agent while dramatically strengthening security posture through comprehensive tooling. Simultaneously refactored major components into modular architectures for better maintainability.

changes.text: Built Overnight Agent workflow for autonomous Claude Code execution with security hardening
Implemented comprehensive security scanning with CodeQL, custom Semgrep rules, and Dependabot
Integrated SonarCloud CI for third-party quality benchmarking and achieved 80% test coverage
Split ContactDetailPanel into 3 focused components reducing complexity from 1259 to 976 lines
Refactored DealDetailPanel into 5 specialized modules cutting size from 945 to 979 lines
Decomposed ClientDetail component into 8 tab-based components reducing from 1840 lines
Hardened AI prompts with XML delimiters and resolved shell injection vulnerabilities
Replaced hardcoded hex colors with theme-aware CSS variables across charts
Added inline error banners for task cloud sync failures with cached data fallback
Created shared sanitization utilities and localStorage versioning system
Updated task processor to run every 5 minutes for better responsiveness
